body:
## Summary
- extend Search query hydration e2e coverage so Clear removes both `q` and `query` URL params and reloads do not restore a cleared query
- assert manual typing after clearing stays local until explicit navigation
- add a focused `--focus-search-route-query-hydration` validator mirror and include the Search hydration keys in full content validation

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-search-route-copy-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern "clear|route query|URL|hydration|param sync"`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`

Browser e2e attempted but local Playwright could not launch because Chromium is not installed at the configured cache path.
title: test: guard search clear URL state
